title: × niduregelia lyman-smithii
intro: × Niduregelia lyman-smithii, also known as the hybrid niduregelia, is a type of bromeliad plant that is a cross between a Nidularium and a Guzmania. The plant is known for its unique, long-lasting inflorescence and vibrant colors, adding a pop of tropical flair to any indoor space. × Niduregelia lyman-smithii has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to promote healing and soothe irritated skin.
